title: CISA KEV Catalog (educational stub — Nexus Dynamics)

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-89: SQL Injection in Production Search API
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SQL injection in NexusFlow search endpoint allowing unauthenticated RCE on manufacturing database
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply patch per vendor instructions or discontinue use
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Nexus Dynamics. Active exploitation observed in manufacturing sector.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: CWE-798: Hardcoded Database Credentials in Configuration
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Hardcoded database credentials in NexusFlow production configuration
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Rotate credentials immediately and implement credential vault
vulnerabilities.notes: Educational stub — Nexus Dynamics. Credentials discovered in world-readable config file.
